# JSON Structure: JSON_AccessToken

```json
{"access_token":"eyJraWQiOiJvYXV0aDJTaWduZXIiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9..VdWItdHyvrv_x_Kv0FI-xZwIn127QYKuALVJj0PH9YYNlBGCOZBuxrbMV8wCwX8qlhE8gvAhBqtBvvSS02Q1jjydaKMLIL5hL-xdruuF5rsqJUyH_K1dxf_acLloO16YT0pUnPo3Oj5R9Xkh2HdN3k42UiHiwG5O3z19cX5Yj9MrfRkUMCcuK2_DmFOlXsHzjNdYzUqXTva6aw-6mO-CLgTAZhVBAx6qfIyh6AfgWHZcws3sRoMtuUShbX1iqnv95twoPlD78glL75o_636QWi0FsQtctu4FjXQWFJ69XEniTBgmZjWgUY_PLMWXfqwVOXYhKbdKgSbwU6b79xKRZQ","refresh_token":"vwDaOaw6zSb1mq1gGdUA8bWq-x_uede7S6g648TeDJo4IfjP2YauH7-nO37cH3nE6lK-0Osl0DWuolHq0BGQJAw6tWajPI2RqttrmPpYrJjW-Luw8eb8iBkRWQ97BDH6","scope":"inboundTransferOrders/read kits/write facilities/write tradingPartners/read customerReturns/read items/write inventory/read tradingPartners/write users/read trips/read locations/read items/read outboundTransferOrders/write outboundTransferOrders/read inboundShipments/read zones/read containers/read receipts/write asynchronousOperations/read purchaseOrders/write kits/read inboundShipments/write vendorReturns/read inventory/write inboundTransferOrders/write receipts/read zones/write salesOrders/write customerReturns/write locations/write containers/write companies/write facilities/read companies/read purchaseOrders/read trips/write users/write salesOrders/read vendorReturns/write asynchronousOperations/write","token_type":"Bearer","expires_in":3599}
```
